Name: GPIODevice.peripheralEnable
Description: Top-level bus gating signal that allows the device to respond to peripheral bus transactions.

Name: GPIODevice.peripheralBus_we
Description: Controls whether writes occur to internal registers (OE, output data, IRQ enable).

Name: GPIODevice.peripheralBus_address
Description: Selects which internal register is targeted for read/write operations.

Name: GPIODevice.peripheralBus_dataRead
Description: Carries data from the device registers (OE, output, input, IRQ enable) back to the bus.

Name: GPIODevice.peripheralBus_dataWrite
Description: Carries write data from the bus to the device’s internal registers.

Name: GPIODevice.gpio_oe
Description: Direction control for each GPIO pin (output enable for driving pins).

Name: GPIODevice.gpio_irq
Description: Aggregated interrupt request based on enabled pins and input state.
